# Manage Tutor

> Bangladesh's home tuition marketplace connecting parents and students with verified home tutors across all 64 districts.

Manage Tutor lets parents post tuition jobs and find vetted tutors by location, subject, and budget. Tutors browse jobs, apply, and grow their teaching practice. All users and jobs are manually reviewed by admins before going live.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Search tutors and tuition jobs across Bangladesh.
- [Find Tutors](/tutors): Browse verified home tutors by district, subject, and class level.
- [Browse Jobs](/jobs): Active tuition jobs posted by parents.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Tutor subscription plans and platform fees.
- [About](/about): What Manage Tutor is and how it works.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Manage Tutor team.
- [Install App](/install): Install Manage Tutor as a mobile app.
- [Sign In / Sign Up](/auth): Create an account as a parent or tutor.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
